conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connections with I, J, and C, as we shared deep personal motivations about our families and explicitly discussed looking out for one another. I particularly appreciated the specific details I shared about their parents and sister, which made our bond feel more genuine and grounded in a common goal. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to E, whose conversation felt more calculating and focused on identifying suspicious behavior rather than building a mutual foundation.

I made informal agreements to keep an eye out for C, D, and E as the game progresses, though these were primarily verbal commitments to stay in touch. While I feel a baseline of trust toward I and H due to our shared drive to provide for our loved ones, I remain cautious of E, as their observant nature and focus on strategy make me wonder if they are prioritizing their own game over any potential alliance.
